text: 27/2/17, 9(14 pmImportant information - Application confirmation | Australian Business Register Page 1 of 1https://abr.gov.au/ABRWeb/Apply/Abn/ApplicationConfirmation.aspx…9&NavGraph=ApplyForAbn&View=ApplicationConfirmation&pid=71&js=1 Your name: Mr KIRAN NARULA Your ABN: 48174101937 ABN status: Active from 03/03/2017 Now that you have completed your ABN application, you may be entitled to apply for other registrations that can assist you to run your business and meet your tax obligations. Select 'Continue' to continue further applications. Print Continue Success: Your application for an Australian Business Number (ABN) has been successful. Important information Your ABN will not be displayed immediately on ABN Lookup. The ABR will send you a confirmation letter in the mail within 14 days. You will also receive written notification of your ABN. Next steps Application confirmation Copyright
